c_symbol_namespace.abi_1x: Existing exported names remain unchanged. New API uses the representative type or stable public module prefix.
c_symbol_namespace.abi_2: Unprefixed legacy helpers may be removed only after a family-prefixed forwarding period.
c_symbol_namespace.exception: navsys_status_t and NAVSYS_STATUS_* are module-foundation type and enum names, not function symbols.

nullable_pointer.current_meaning: allocation failure, invalid input, no path, or not found may all be NULL
nullable_pointer.canonical: status return plus typed out pointer

bool_predicate.canonical: keep bool when evaluation itself cannot fail

bool_operation.current_meaning: success and domain outcome are conflated

int_count.current_meaning: non-negative count with no separate error channel

void_fallible_operation.current_meaning: invalid input, allocation, callback, or cancellation cannot be reported

enum_result.current_meaning: unknown value may combine invalid input and unsupported state

floating_result.current_meaning: NaN, infinity, and sentinel values are not a stable error channel

callback_return.current_meaning: callback failure is absent or family-specific
callback_return.canonical: navsys_status_t callback with userdata bound atomically

output_policy.negative_status: Preserve every output unless the function contract explicitly permits a partial result.
output_policy.incomplete: Write required counts and explicitly documented partial outputs only.
output_policy.not_found: Preserve value outputs; query-specific out_found may be written only when declared.
output_policy.diagnostics: No global or thread-local last-error is the sole error channel.

abi_1x: retain all existing exported symbols and enum numeric values
forward deprecated functions without changing legacy semantics
